name: Deviled Crab Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sautee chopped green pepper and parsley until slightly softened.
2. Combine crabmeat, mashed potatoes, Old Bay seasoning, chopped eggs, green pepper, parsley, and beaten egg in a bowl.
3. Shape the mixture into croquettes.
4. Roll each croquette in cracker meal.
5. Deep fry the croquettes until they are golden brown.
